entries.definition:
وَالْقَلَمِ وَما يَسْطُرُونَ by the pen!, and by what they [the scribes] write!
مَسْطُور masṭūr [pass. part.] 1 written, inscribed (52:2) وَكِتابٍ مَسْطُورٍ by a Book inscribed 2 recorded, laid down, detailed (33:6) كانَ ذلِكَ فِي الْكِتابِ مَسْطُورًا all that is in the Book, detailed.

مُسْتَطَر mustaṭar [pass. part. of v. VIII] carefully recorded in writing (54:53) وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُسْتَطَر every action, great or small, is recorded in writing.

أَساطِير ʾasāṭīr [pl. of either n. أُسْطُورَة ʾusṭūratun or of pl. أَسْطار ʾasṭār] fables (16:24) قالُوا أَساطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ and when they are asked, ‘What has your Lord sent down?’ they say, ‘Fables of the ancients.’

مُسَيْطِر musayṭir (also مُصَيْطِر muṣayṭir) [act. part., spelled with a ص (ṣ) but pronounced as a س (s)] one in control (88:22) لَسْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِمُصَيْطِرٍ you are not in control over them.

وَالْقَلَمِ وَما يَسْطُرُونَ by the pen!, and by what they [the scribes] write!
مَسْطُور masṭūr [pass. part.] 1 written, inscribed (52:2) وَكِتابٍ مَسْطُورٍ by a Book inscribed 2 recorded, laid down, detailed (33:6) كانَ ذلِكَ فِي الْكِتابِ مَسْطُورًا all that is in the Book, detailed.

مُسْتَطَر mustaṭar [pass. part. of v. VIII] carefully recorded in writing (54:53) وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُسْتَطَر every action, great or small, is recorded in writing.

أَساطِير ʾasāṭīr [pl. of either n. أُسْطُورَة ʾusṭūratun or of pl. أَسْطار ʾasṭār] fables (16:24) قالُوا أَساطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ and when they are asked, ‘What has your Lord sent down?’ they say, ‘Fables of the ancients.’

مُسَيْطِر musayṭir (also مُصَيْطِر muṣayṭir) [act. part., spelled with a ص (ṣ) but pronounced as a س (s)] one in control (88:22) لَسْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِمُصَيْطِرٍ you are not in control over them.

entries.definition:
s-ṭ-w to assail, to assault, to pounce upon, to attack violently. Of this root, only يَسْطُونَ yasṭūn occurs once in the Qur’an.
يَسْطُونَ yasṭūn [imperf. of v. سطا saṭā, intrans. with preps بـ and على] to assault, to attack violently (22:72) يَكادُونَ يَسْطُونَ بِالَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ آياتِنا they almost attack those who recite to them Our revelations.

سَعَة saʿatun (see و/س/ع w-s-ʿ).
entries.definition_english:
s-ṭ-w to assail, to assault, to pounce upon, to attack violently. Of this root, only يَسْطُونَ yasṭūn occurs once in the Qur’an.
يَسْطُونَ yasṭūn [imperf. of v. سطا saṭā, intrans. with preps بـ and على] to assault, to attack violently (22:72) يَكادُونَ يَسْطُونَ بِالَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ آياتِنا they almost attack those who recite to them Our revelations.

سَعَة saʿatun (see و/س/ع w-s-ʿ).
